notes: Confirmed: GTK3 and GTK4 SKDrawingArea views have no scroll wheel event handling. Neither view subscribes to scroll events, attaches EventControllerScroll (GTK4), or sets ScrollMask (GTK3). The WheelDelta/WheelChanged infrastructure exists only in the MAUI Core layer (Windows implementation). This is a feature request — the requested functionality does not exist yet.

reproductionSteps.description: Inspect GTK4 SKDrawingArea.cs for scroll event handling — confirmed file has 105 lines with only PaintSurface rendering via SetDrawFunc callback, no scroll controllers, no input events
reproductionSteps.output: 105 lines. File contains: constructor with SetDrawFunc, OnDrawFunc rendering method, OnPaintSurface event, Dispose, CreateDrawingObjects, FreeDrawingObjects. No EventControllerScroll, no AddController, no scroll/wheel/touch references.

reproductionSteps.description: Inspect GTK3 SKDrawingArea.cs for scroll event handling — confirmed file has 104 lines with only OnDrawn rendering, no scroll event subscription
reproductionSteps.output: 104 lines. File contains: constructor, OnDrawn rendering override, OnPaintSurface event, Dispose, CreateDrawingObjects, FreeDrawingObjects. No EventMask.ScrollMask, no ScrollEvent handler, no input handling.

reproductionSteps.description: Verify WheelDelta/WheelChanged exists in MAUI Core (reference implementation) but not in GTK views
Confirm no SKTouchHandler or scroll-related files exist for either GTK platform
reproductionSteps.output:
source/SkiaSharp.Views/SkiaSharp.Views.Gtk3/SKDrawingArea.cs
source/SkiaSharp.Views/SkiaSharp.Views.Gtk4/SKDrawingArea.cs

Only one .cs file per GTK view directory. No Touch/Input/Scroll handler files exist.

versionResults.notes: Feature does not exist. Latest stable SkiaSharp.Views.Gtk4 NuGet package has no scroll event handling — source inspection of SKDrawingArea confirms only PaintSurface rendering.
Feature does not exist on main branch either. GTK3 and GTK4 SKDrawingArea have no scroll event handling in the current source.

actionability.reason: Well-scoped enhancement filed by the maintainer with complete implementation guidance. Confirmed the feature is absent — ready for implementation as part of the v120 normalization effort (#3533).

actions.description: Area label could be refined to area/SkiaSharp.Views since changes are in the view layer

proposedResponse.body:
Confirmed via source inspection: neither the GTK3 nor GTK4 `SKDrawingArea` views have any scroll wheel event handling. The `WheelDelta`/`WheelChanged` infrastructure exists in the MAUI Core layer (with a working Windows implementation), but no equivalent `SKTouchHandler` or scroll event wiring exists for GTK platforms.

Specifically:
- **GTK4** `SKDrawingArea` — no `EventControllerScroll` attached, no input events of any kind
- **GTK3** `SKDrawingArea` — no `ScrollMask` set, no `ScrollEvent` handler
- No `SKTouchHandler` equivalent exists for either GTK view

This is ready for implementation following the specification in the issue body.
